description: Confirmed that all reported ratios and regression fits use densities evaluated at identical N = 10¹⁰ for all k and both digit sets, not at different scales. Also, regression was performed on raw ratios (see supplied data). Standard errors for both amplitude and exponent are given; R² is reported and available in the data section. Regression at multiple N is in progress for future releases.
